title: Hollyone Donut Ceramic Vase for Pampas Grass, 7.9''/20CM Black and Gold Flower Vase, Decorative Dried Flower Vase Home Decor Accessories, Aesthetic Ornament for Living Room, Bedroom, Kitchen
features: Are you looking for timeless and meaningful decoration ideas for your living room? These two-tone ceramic vases bring life to any room with their classic colors and donut shape!
Size: 5.3''/13.5cm x 7.9''/20cm. Vintage decoration and modern ambience benefit equally from these durable ceramic vases.

The edges of our ceramic vase show an elegant silhouette with which the touch is smooth. As the center of a table decoration with flowers or plants, these black and gold ornaments immediately attract attention.

These glossy vases are oval and end in a 1.2''/3cm narrow opening. In this form, the decorative vase is particularly suitable for medium-high pampas grass, meadow flowers, blossoms from the garden and dried floristry.
Suitable as a focal point on the windowsill, as a complement to a fashionable decoration on the tray or as the eye-catcher of your living room, bedroom, kitchen, bathroom, etc.
